# Withings Mcp
Unofficial local-first Withings MCP server for AI health, sleep and activity agents.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/withingsmcp
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/withings
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/withings-mcp-unofficial
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=withings-mcp-unofficial -- withings-mcp-unofficial doctor
MCP command: withings-mcp-unofficial
Agent surfaces:
- MCP registry name: io.github.davidmosiah/withingsmcp
- Start with the connection/status or agent-manifest surface when available.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
Safety:
- Do not paste credentials, OAuth tokens, refresh tokens, API keys or raw private exports into chat.
- Keep local config and generated data out of git.
- Treat outputs as operational context, not medical, legal or financial advice unless the repo explicitly supports that domain.
